name: scaffold-generator
description: Generate CI-ready Dart package scaffolding for the coding-adventures monorepo

flags.description: Package type: 'library' goes in code/packages/, 'program' goes in code/programs/
Target language. This bootstrap implementation accepts 'dart' or 'all' (which resolves to the Dart lane).
Comma-separated list of sibling Dart package names this scaffold depends on
Print what would be generated without writing files

arguments.name: PACKAGE_NAME
arguments.description: Name of the package in kebab-case (for example 'my-package')
